hooks.command: input=$(cat); file=$(echo "$input" | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get('tool_input',{}).get('file_path',''))"); if echo "$file" | grep -qE '(^|/)(\.env)$'; then echo "Blocked: do not edit .env directly — it contains live credentials. Update .env.example for documentation instead." >&2; exit 2; fi

input=$(cat); file=$(echo "$input" | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get('tool_input',{}).get('file_path',''))"); if echo "$file" | grep -qE 'app/ml_models/.*\.json$'; then echo "Blocked: ML model artifacts are generated files. Regenerate via CLI (e.g. 'flask retrain-model'), not manual edits." >&2; exit 2; fi

echo "REMINDERS FOR THIS PROJECT: (1) Tests use unittest, not pytest — run: source .venv/bin/activate && SECRET_KEY=test python -m coverage run -m unittest discover -s tests -v (2) All date/time logic uses ET timezone (ZoneInfo America/New_York). (3) Do not edit .env or app/ml_models/*.json directly. (4) Never include Co-Authored-By tags in git commits."
